chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Tr. Appln. No. S– 88 of 2022 Date Order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of cases 1. For orders on Office objection at Flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 07.04.2023 Mr. Alam Sher Bozdar, Advocate for the Applicant Mr. Imran Mobeen Khan, Assistant Prosecutor General for the State <><><><>..<><><><> Learned counsel for the applicant after arguing the matter at some length does not press instant Criminal Transfer Application; however, seeks direction to learned trial Court to conclude the trial expeditiously and preferably within a period of two months hereof. Learned Assistant Advocate General states that expeditious trial is right of the party, hence, he has no objection to the proposition of the learned counsel for the applicant. Accordingly, this Criminal Transfer Application is disposed of directing to trial Court i.e. II-Civil Judge and Judicial Magistrate, Mirpur Mathelo to conclude the trial in Criminal Case No.63/2022 (Re. The State vs. Nazeer Ahmed Kalhoro and others) expeditiously and preferably within a period of two months. The complainant is also directed to ensure his appearance as well as the appearance of his witnesses for evidence before the trial Court on the next date of hearing. The Criminal Transfer Application stands disposed of in the above terms. Judge ARBROHI
